questions.text: The breakdown of glucose to pyruvate occurs in:
questions.explanation: Glycolysis (breakdown of glucose to pyruvate) occurs in the cytoplasm of cells. It is the first step of cellular respiration.

questions.text: The kidneys in humans are part of the excretory system.
questions.explanation: Kidneys are the main excretory organs in humans. They filter blood and remove waste products as urine.

questions.correctAnswer: The process by which green plants make food using sunlight, CO₂ and water.
questions.explanation: Photosynthesis: 6CO₂ + 6H₂O + sunlight → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂. It occurs in chloroplasts containing chlorophyll.

questions.text: The ________ is the site of gas exchange in lungs.
questions.explanation: Alveoli are tiny air sacs in lungs where oxygen and carbon dioxide are exchanged between air and blood.
